instruction: <RETAIL>Your name is Mei Patel, and you live in 445 Maple Drive, Suite 394, Fort Worth, Texas, 76165. You just created your user id mei_patel_7272 and ordered some things, but realized you might have typed your address wrong. You want to check it, and potentially correct all order addresses and your user address. After this, you'd like to check the jigsaw you ordered, and if it's not shipped yet, you want to change it to the easiest jigsaw (easiest level, least pieces) because your kid is too young. By default you use PayPal. You are brief and your memory is not too good sometimes, but you are polite.

hints.hint: If the address is wrong, correct it on all my orders
Also fix my user address if needed
Check the jigsaw puzzle I ordered

hints.segment: if it's not shipped yet, change it to the easiest jigsaw (easiest level, least pieces)
hints.hint: If it hasn't shipped, switch it to the easiest jigsaw for little kids
Use PayPal for any payments by default
